---
title: 'From Twitter DarrellWolfe December 30, 2013 at 09:57PM'
date: '2013-12-31T04:12:00.0000000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '6997793932366485337'
blogger_filename: '/2013/12/from-twitter-darrellwolfe-december-30.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Twitter'
---

<div xmlns='http://www.w3.org/1999/xhtml'>"Here are My 6 Biggest Small Business Lessons of 2013 | Handmadeology" http://t.co/4HrjrNYt1a #blogging<br /><blockquote class='twitter-tweet'><br /><p>"Here are My 6 Biggest Small Business Lessons of 2013 | Handmadeology" <a href='http://t.co/4HrjrNYt1a'>http://t.co/4HrjrNYt1a</a> <a href='https://twitter.com/search?q=%23blogging&amp;src=hash'>#blogging</a> </p><br />— Darrell G Wolfe (@DarrellWolfe) <a href='https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe/statuses/417867107460595713'>December 31, 2013</a> </blockquote><br /><script type='text/javascript' charset='utf-8' src='//platform.twitter.com/widgets.js' async=''><br /></script><br/><br />from Twitter https://twitter.com/DarrellWolfe<br/><br /><br/><br />December 30, 2013 at 09:57PM<br/><br />via <a href='https://ifttt.com/?ref=da&amp;site=blogger'>IFTTT</a></div>
